story.title: OpenAI and Hugging Face address security incident during model evaluation

draft:
I've been following the recent security incident at OpenAI and Hugging Face. 
The issue occurred during model evaluation, highlighting vulnerabilities in AI systems. 
As someone working in AI, I'm concerned about the potential risks. 
What steps can we take to prevent similar incidents in the future?
#AIsecurity #OpenAI #HuggingFace
